channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Artemis 2 Is Coming in Hot Today—Here Are the 4 Critical Phases to Watch
item.description: Each step of the Orion spacecraft’s atmospheric reentry is essential to crew safety.

item.title: « Copilot est uniquement destiné au divertissement » : les conditions d’utilisation de l’IA font peur
item.description: En lisant les conditions d'utilisation de Copilot, on a l'impression que Microsoft ne croit pas vraiment en sa propre IA. Mais l'entreprise a une explication.

item.title: Vidéoprojecteur TCL, écran QD‑OLED MSI et batterie Ugreen : les 3 meilleures promos tech du vendredi 10 avril 2026
item.description: En ce vendredi 10 avril 2026, les bons plans ne manquent pas du côté des marchands comme Amazon et Boulanger.

item.title: « Nous ne voulons pas de clones » : le designers de Stellantis veut différencier chaque voiture de chaque marque du groupe
item.description: Après un bref passage chez Renault, Gilles Vidal est revenu l'an dernier chez Stellantis en charge du design européen des voitures du groupe. Et ce dernier affiche une ambition claire : que les marques du groupe cessent de se cannibaliser.

item.title: Microsoft warns worrying security flaw exposed over 50 million Android users, says 'user credentials and financial data were exposed to risk'
item.description: An outdated SDK carries a dangerous flaw that allows threat actors to steal private data.

item.title: Meilleur smartphone Samsung Galaxy : pour quel modèle opter en 2026 ?
item.description: La firme coréenne propose l'une des gammes de smartphones les plus complètes sur le marché de la téléphonie. Quel est le téléphone Samsung qui est fait pour vous ? Vous trouverez ici les détails de leur catalogue et surtout nos conseils pour choisir le plus adapté.

item.title: Scientist Spots New Meteor Shower Linked to a Disintegrating Asteroid
item.description: Astronomer Patrick M. Shober found a new meteor shower—and it comes from an asteroid getting broken down by the Sun.

item.title: PC Industry in Dire Straits, ‘Asking You to Own Nothing and Be Happy,’ Says Framework CEO
item.description: At least one laptop maker is saying what PC owners have all been thinking.

item.title: Le Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8 se dévoile : voici les premières images du design
item.description: Voici les premières images du Galaxy Z Flip 8, le prochain smartphone pliant à clapet de Samsung.

item.title: Revolut débarque bientôt dans les gares et aéroports en France : voici de nouveaux distributeurs qui vont faciliter la vie des voyageurs
item.description: Il y a trois ans, la banque en ligne Revolut installait des distributeurs de cartes bancaires dans plusieurs aéroports européens. À Rome, Bruxelles, Porto et Helsinki, les voyageurs peuvent retirer une carte neuve avant leur décollage. Selon nos informations, ces distributeurs pourraient bientôt arriver dans les aéroports et gares en France.

item.title: Meta Is Upgrading One of the Worst Parts of Its Smart Glasses
item.description: And no, it's not privacy.

item.title: Wit Studio Apologizes After Being Caught Using Generative AI Background Art Again
item.description: Following fan roastings for the AI-generated background art in its Crunchyroll fantasy anime, 'Ascendance of a Bookworm,' the studio promises to actually animate the sequence with human artists.

item.title: ‘Apple will grit its teeth and push through’ — new report suggests the iPhone Air 2 isn’t dead, and I sincerely hope it’s true
item.description: Apple will reportedly release the iPhone Air 2 ‘no matter how badly it sells,' and while I don't necessarily believe it, I hope it's true.

item.title: After soaring 2,200%, DDR4 RAM prices finally fall — but don't get too excited
item.description: We're seeing more positive signs that the RAM crisis is easing somewhat, but be careful not to raise your expectations too high.

item.title: How to watch the Artemis II landing
item.description: After its history-making trip around the Moon, NASA's Artemis II mission is set to return to Earth later today. The Orion spacecraft carrying astronauts Reid Wiseman, Christina Koch, Victor Glover and Jeremy Hansen is scheduled to splash down off the coast of San Diego at approximately 8:07PM ET. NASA will stream the landing on YouTube and its NASA+ website, as will Netflix and HBO Max. The official broadcast will begin at 6:30PM ET. After leaving Earth on NASA's super heavy-lift SLS rocket and spending nine days in space, the most dangerous part of the Artemis II mission still lies ahead. It...

item.title: Darty casse en deux le prix de cet excellent ancien smartphone haut de gamme de Google
item.description: Le Google Pixel 9 a certes été dépassé par le Pixel 10, et le Pixel 11 est l'un des smartphones les plus attendus de 2026. Pour autant, le Pixel 9 reste un modèle tout à fait recommandable, surtout quand son prix passe de 899 euros à 449 euros sur Darty.

item.title: Google Chrome rolls out a new tool to try and stop infostealer malware in its tracks
item.description: New Device Bound Session Credentials feature for Google Chrome is also coming to macOS soon.

item.title: Beyond no-log: Tor looks into seizure-proof servers that forget your data
item.description: The Tor Project is working with relay operators to develop "stateless" servers that run entirely in RAM. By forgetting all data upon reboot, these self-wiping relays will protect users and node operators from hardware seizures.

item.title: France to ditch Windows for Linux to reduce reliance on US tech
item.description: France's move to ditch Windows for Linux is its latest effort to reduce its reliance on American tech giants.

item.title: Windows 11 : Microsoft admet un « problème » avec l’horloge, mais c’est fait exprès
item.description: Certains utilisateurs ont cru avoir repéré un nouveau bug sur Windows 11. En effet, l’heure affichée sur l’écran de verrouillage n’est pas toujours la même que celle renseignée sur le bureau. Sur son blog, Microsoft explique la raison.

item.title: YouTube Premium and YouTube Music are getting more expensive
item.description: The YouTube Premium individual plan is increasing from $13.99 to $15.99 per month, while the family plan is increasing from $22.99 to $26.99 per month.

item.title: There's a sneaky way to watch IPL 2026 for FREE
item.description: We've found a sneaky way to stream IPL 2026 live streams for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: J’ai testé le MGS6 EV : pourquoi ce concurrent du Tesla Model Y n’aimera pas beaucoup les grands trajets
item.description: MG est en pleine offensive dans sa gamme de voitures électriques. En parallèle du renouvellement de la MG4 et de l’arrivée de la MG4 Urban abordable, la marque lance le MGS6 EV, un SUV électrique familial. Peut-il rivaliser avec la cohorte menée par les Tesla Model Y, Volkswagen ID.4 et Peugeot E-5008 ? Voici notre essai.

item.title: Exit 8 just got a major discount on Steam, just in time for the movies release
item.description: The movie adaptation of the Japanese game 'Exit 8' premieres April 10, and now you can play the game at a major discount. Right now, grab 'Exit 8' for just $2.79 on Steam.

item.title: 'Two Hells collide' — Doom: The Dark Ages and Diablo Immortal unite in a limited-time crossover event, The Slayer Reign, this month
item.description: Blizzard Entertainment has announced a new limited-time crossover event that brings Doom: The Dark Ages to Diablo Immortal.

item.title: New FCC rule will make Starlink satellite internet faster and cheaper
item.description: A new FCC rule could lower satellite internet cost, but it might cause some trouble as well.

item.title: Every fusion startup that has raised over $100M
item.description: Fusion startups have raised $7.1 billion to date, with the majority of it going to a handful of companies.

item.title: Votre Galaxy est-il dans la liste ? Samsung étend le support d’AirDrop à ces nouveaux modèles
item.description: Après les Galaxy S26, Samsung déploie actuellement le support d'AirDrop via la fonction Quick Share sur un plus grand nombre de smartphones Galaxy. Voici la nouvelle liste.

item.title: It’s Already Time to Start the Casting Rumors for Marvel’s ‘X-Men’ Movie
item.description: Plus, the team behind 'Final Destination: Bloodlines' is going to try taking on 'Metal Gear Solid'.

item.title: Why your Whoop might tell you to up your testosterone
item.description: This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent every Friday from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life. Opt in for Optimizer here. Last week, our editor-in-chief Nilay Patel messaged me about his new Whoop band, which he'd gotten thanks to […]

item.title: Last 24 hours: Save up to $500 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass
item.description: This is it. Tonight is your last chance to lock in savings of up to $500 for your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass. These discounts end at 11:59 p.m. PT.

item.title: 8 new movies and TV shows to watch on Netflix, Prime Video, HBO Max, and more this weekend (April 10)
item.description: From returning hit shows to a couple of intriguing new films, here's what you'll want to watch this weekend.

item.title: Spotify is rolling out new video controls, and as someone who hates its in-app music videos, I know this will be a huge hit
item.description: Spotify's new video controls allow you to disable Canvas videos, music videos, and other visual content for an audio-first experience.

item.title: Sony Bravia Theater Bar 5 review: A basic TV sound booster
item.description:
Not everyone needs a $1,000 soundbar. It’s easy to argue the sonic superiority of those flagship models from Samsung, Sonos and Sony, but for some people a simple boost to their TV speakers can provide a world of difference. As part of its 2026 soundbar lineup, Sony debuted the Bravia Theater Bar 5: a $350 entry-level model that covers the basics and comes with a wireless subwoofer in the box. The real question here is how many features are you willing to live without.
The good: Sound quality, bass performance and setup The Theater Bar 5 is the most compact soundbar among Sony’s new models,...

item.title: New U.S. military draft and Iran war: Rumors are flying on social media. Here’s what you need to know
item.description: America is initiating an automatic registration system in 2026 for ‘Selective Service’ in the military. Here’s what that means. Social media has been abuzz in recent days about America’s new, upcoming automatic military draft registration system. And it’s no surprise why.
